occultReliquary.choose: Choose initial slot type for Occult Reliquary

oneTwoPunch.skip: Do not fight that enemy again

stormRuler.exhaust: Exhaust Storm Ruler to deal {count} damage to an enemy at your location

blessedBlade.exhaust: Exhaust Blessed Blade (4) to add 1 {'{'}bless{'}'} token | Exhaust Blessed Blade (4) to add {count} {'{'}bless{'}'} tokens

alchemicalDistillation.placeChargeOrSecret: Place {count} charge or secret on an asset you control | Place {count} charges or secrets on an asset you control

shortcut.ability: {'{'}fast{'}'} Exhaust Shortcut: _Move_ (to a connecting location). Any investigator at this location may trigger this ability.
